prompt: Create a photorealistic 16:9 YouTube thumbnail-style wide-angle selfie taken inside an overnight train sleeper compartment at night. In the right foreground, show one young adult man with light blond-brown messy hair wearing a plain black T-shirt and one black smartwatch, holding his hand on top of his head in a stressed or surprised pose; his face is deliberately hidden by one large opaque vertical rectangle in a warm medium-brown censor color, covering the entire face area from forehead to chin. The left half of the image shows the open doorway and window of a compact sleeper cabin with beige wood paneling, metal door frame, bright white interior lighting, a red/orange bed or blanket, white pillows, and small travel items on the bunk. Outside the train on the far left, show exactly one red ÖBB passenger train speeding past on parallel tracks, with motion blur, glowing carriage windows, the white “ÖBB” logo visible, dark mountains in the background, and a bright full moon in a cloudy deep-blue night sky. Use dramatic ultra-wide perspective, strong contrast between warm cabin light and cool night exterior, realistic lens distortion, crisp details on the interior and person, motion blur only on the passing train and tracks, no extra text overlays, no watermark.
